name: Cafe Brulot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cinnamon, cloves and citrus rinds in a chafing dish or medium skillet; heat until sugar begins to dissolve.
2. Add citrus slices, liquer and brandy; heat.
3. Half fill a metal ladle with some of the hot liquid and carefully ignite it.
4. Add to mixture in pan to ignite, ladling to distribute flavors evenly.
5. When flame dies out, add coffee; stir gently.
6. Serve in demitasse cups; garnish with curls of lemon and orange rind if desired.
